queries: Eli Lilly LLY Q1 2026 earnings results

results.title: Lilly Q1 2026 results call set for April 30 | LLY Stock News
results.snippet: Eli Lilly and Company will announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 30, 2026. A conference call and live webcast will follow at 10 a.m. Eastern time.

results.title: Quarterly Results | Eli Lilly and Company
results.snippet: Eli Lilly's investor site hosts Q1 2026 earnings materials including the press release, presentation, and estimated acquired IPR&D charges. Materials are available for download ahead of the April 30 release.

results.title: Eli Lilly and Company Q1 2026 Earnings Report
results.snippet: Eli Lilly is scheduled to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026 before the market opens. Consensus estimates project EPS of $7.26 and revenue of $17.61 billion.

results.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Earnings - Public Investing
results.snippet: Eli Lilly's Q1 2026 earnings are expected on April 30, 2026 with consensus EPS around $7.22. The page tracks historical earnings and upcoming call details.

results.title: Investors | Eli Lilly and Company
results.snippet: The official investor relations page schedules the Q1 2026 Earnings Call for April 30, 2026 at 10:00 AM EDT. Additional quarterly calls are listed through 2026.

results.title: Eli Lilly obesity pill Foundayo gets the FDA green light
results.snippet: The FDA has approved Eli Lilly's daily GLP-1 pill Foundayo for obesity, the second such oral medication after Novo Nordisk's pill form of Wegovy. It offers a convenient alternative to injectable weight-loss drugs and is expected to compete directly in the growing market.

results.title: Eli Lilly GLP-1 pill Foundayo approved for obesity
results.snippet: The FDA approved Eli Lilly’s once-daily GLP-1 pill Foundayo for obesity treatment. It follows Novo Nordisk’s oral Wegovy and may appeal to patients seeking convenience without injection, though it shows slightly lower average weight loss in trials.

results.title: America Has a New GLP-1 Playbook
results.snippet: Eli Lilly debuted its weight-loss tablet Foundayo, which is less effective than its injectable Zepbound but easier to take than the competing Wegovy pill. The new oral GLP-1 options are expanding access and flexibility in obesity treatment.

results.title: The weight-loss drug rivalry heats up as another GLP-1 pill gains FDA approval
results.snippet: Eli Lilly’s Foundayo became the second approved GLP-1 weight-loss pill after Novo Nordisk’s oral Wegovy in December 2025. Clinical trials showed it helped patients lose an average of 27 pounds over 72 weeks.

results.title: Lilly's weight-loss pill wins US approval, sets up next battle with rival Novo Nordisk
results.snippet: The FDA approved Eli Lilly's once-daily oral GLP-1 drug orforglipron, branded as Foundayo, for weight loss. This approval positions it to compete with Novo Nordisk’s recently launched oral Wegovy in the expanding GLP-1 market.

results.title: Assessing Eli Lilly (LLY) Valuation After Recent Share ...
results.snippet: Analysts project Mounjaro sales of $18.4 B in 2025 and $22.8B in 2026, and Zepbound jumping from $4.9B (2024) to $12.5 B in 2025 (and $18.1B in 2026). Eli Lilly is seen as undervalued with analyst targets and intrinsic estimates implying a fair value around $1,189.

results.title: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) Stock Forecast & Price Target
results.snippet: According to 30 analysts, the average twelve-month price target for Eli Lilly and Company is $1,224.59, representing 32.33% upside from recent prices near $925. The high target is $1,350 and the low is $850.

results.title: Eli Lilly Stock in 2026: FDA Approval, GLP-1 Momentum ...
results.snippet: As of April 2026, Lilly's average street target price was about $1,209 according to 29 analysts. The analysis highlights FDA approvals, continued GLP-1 momentum, and potential 44% valuation upside for the stock.

results.title: Could Lilly Stock Go To $2000?
results.snippet: Eli Lilly stock could potentially surge to $2,000 in coming years driven by new treatments and earnings growth. The stock trades at roughly 27x estimated 2026 earnings with expanding margins and obesity drug opportunities.

results.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions ...
results.snippet: 18 analysts give Eli Lilly a Buy consensus rating with a 2026 price target of $1,215. The forecast reflects expected growth but is subject to updates based on market conditions and earnings.
